selection_brief: Choose current official Aqara product photography that clearly shows a real M100, M200, or M3 in a warm practical home scene. Favor natural wood, soft residential light, and a restrained dark-green accent. The crop must keep the device recognizable in both the article hero and 16:9 library card.
selected_asset: Aqara Hub M200 official lifestyle photograph on a wooden table beside a plant and book
negative_criteria: embedded headline, marketing text, charts, graphs, network paths, decorative routing lines, translucent panels, inset frames, floating UI cards, progress bars, fake hardware, generic diagrams, repeated TaraHome cover imagery
generation_note: No generative or deterministic renderer was used. Accurate official product photography was selected because this is a product comparison.
